help_menu: 🥰 Click the buttons below to get information about my commands. Note: All commands can be used with /
help_admins: 🔔 Admin commands: /pause: Pause stream. /resume: 🚀 Resume stream. /skip: Skip stream. /stop: 🛡 Stop stream. /seek [seconds]: Forward seek. /reload: 😵‍💫 Reload admin cache.
help_auth: 🔔 Auth commands: /auth: Add authorized user. /unauth: Remove authorized user.
help_blist: 🍾 Blacklist commands: /blacklist: Add chat/user. /unblacklist: Remove chat/user.
help_lang: 🌸 Language commands: /lang: Change the bot language.
help_ping: ⚡️ Ping commands: /ping: Check bot status. /start: Start the bot.
help_play: 🎶 Play commands: /play: Play music. /vplay: Play music video. -f: Force play. -v: Video mode.
help_queue: 🖤 Queue commands: /queue: Shows currently queued tracks.
help_stats: 🌟 Stats commands: /stats: Shows the bot's stats.
help_sudo: 🥷 Sudo commands: /ac: Active calls. /broadcast: Broadcast message. /eval: Execute code. /restart: 🚀 Restart bot. /addsudo: Add sudo user.
